inputs.text: Mujhe bahut tezi se fever ho gayi hai aur bahut buri headache ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Acute onset of high fever and headache

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever and headache are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, early stages of Dengue are less likely without other symptoms

inputs.text: Mujhe aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai aur haddiyan toot rahi hain

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Joint pain is common in Chikungunya, but retro-orbital pain is less common

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever may cause body aches, but the specific pattern of symptoms is less typical

inputs.text: Mujhe fever kam ho gayi hai, lekin lal daane nikal aaye hain aur masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of fever drop, rash, and bleeding gums is highly suggestive of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever may cause rash, but the combination with bleeding gums is less typical

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria may cause fever, but the specific pattern of symptoms is less typical

inputs.text: Mujhe bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai aur bruising bhi ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The presence of bruising and severe weakness confirms the diagnosis of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the presence of specific symptoms characteristic of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the presence of specific symptoms characteristic of Dengue
